===Pokémon Trading Card Game=== Bianca has had a variety of merchandise released exclusively for the Pokémon Trading Card Game. ====Bianca==== Deck Boxes, Sleeves, Dividers and a Mat, known as '''Bianca''', released on January 26, 2024,[https://web.archive.org/web/20240120092154/https://www.pokemon-card.com/products/#surroundingGoods The Japanese Pokémon website confirming that the Bianca TCG merch released on Friday, January 26, 2024.] drawn by [[Nao (illustrator)|Nao.]][https://archive.is/5fqPh Nao confirming they drew the Bianca TCG merch.] {{MerchGallery2 |background={{White color}} |border={{White color dark}} |image1=Bianca Deck Case Front.jpg |image2=Bianca Deck Case Back.jpg |image3=Bianca Sleeves.jpg |image4=Bianca Dividers.jpg |image5=Bianca Deck Case Mat.jpg |caption1=Deck Box
(Front) |caption2=Deck Box
